Relic & Rune

search

Sword Collections

Organize the ancient steel of the realm. Categorize by weight, blessing, or the darkness they carry.

Rank: Common

One-Handed Swords

Versatile blades meant for quick strikes. Ideal for scouts and infantrymen who favor agility over raw power.

142 Artifacts arrow_forward
Rank: Heavy

Two-Handed Greatswords

Massive iron implements forged for the strongest warriors. Capable of cleaving through plate armor with ease.

58 Artifacts arrow_forward
Rank: Forbidden

Cursed Blades

Weapons that hunger for the essence of their wielder. High risk, devastating power, and eternal damnation.

12 Artifacts auto_awesome
Rank: Exalted

Holy Relics

Blades blessed by the High Clerics. These weapons shine in the presence of darkness and purge the wicked.

24 Artifacts arrow_forward
add_circle
